final_prompt.prompt:
Create a technical step-by-step instructional diagram illustrating how to deploy hermes inside a docker container and integrate glmcodingplan.

Style/medium: needs a clean technical-documentation illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a vertical multi-step layout with clearly numbered steps 1, 2, 3, 4
Subject: must include all 4 deployment steps:
  Step 1: docker 环境准备 / 拉取 hermes 镜像
  Step 2: 启动 docker 容器并配置 hermes
  Step 3: 接入 glmcodingplan（配置连接参数）
  Step 4: 验证部署成功 / 运行测试
Scene/backdrop: needs a dark terminal / IDE-style backdrop — exact color scheme is yours
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs a technical dark-mode direction — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include step labels "1" "2" "3" "4" (large, prominent), and code/command snippets per step (e.g. docker run, hermes config, glmcodingplan integration commands) rendered as monospace terminal text
Constraints: must preserve clear visual separation between each numbered step; each step must contain a sub-diagram or icon illustrating the action
Avoid: must avoid cluttered or illegible small text; avoid decorative non-technical elements
